message:
test(lax): add comprehensive unit tests for arithmetic, comparison, and reduction ops

Add test modules to arithmetic.rs (binary elementwise, unary, integer
promotion, broadcasting, special values for pow/atan2/nextafter),
comparison.rs (scalar/vector eq/ne/lt/le/gt/ge, integer/mixed type,
broadcasting), and reduction.rs (reduce sum/max/min/prod along axes,
argmin/argmax, scatter-add, gather, cumsum, sort, top_k).

Each module includes helper constructors (s_f64, v_f64, mat_f64, etc.)
and extractors for clean test assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
